expectations.evidence: All required sections present: [Context], [Task], [Output Constraint], four elements, continuation marker.

DOMAIN covers 10 SCM sub-areas: demand forecasting, procurement/SRM, inventory optimization, warehouse management, order management/fulfillment, transportation/freight logistics, production planning/scheduling, returns/reverse logistics, supply chain visibility/risk management, plus enterprise tech stack (ERP, WMS, TMS, OMS, APS, EDI/API).

GOAL captures: 'complete newcomer suddenly assigned', system scope/requirements definition, vendor proposal evaluation, asking informed questions, prioritization decisions, establishing credibility in cross-functional discussions with warehouse managers, procurement teams, transportation coordinators, IT architects.
Entire file is in English despite Korean input.
